screenshots.title: Capture current AI chats with one click
screenshots.caption: The popup keeps save actions simple, explicit, and local-first.

screenshots.title: Route captures into durable projects
screenshots.caption: Projects, timeline history, and export actions sit above any individual chat app.

screenshots.title: Search local archives by project and platform
screenshots.caption: Find exact decisions, prompts, and outputs without reopening old tabs.

screenshots.title: Control exactly where the extension can run
screenshots.caption: Supported sites are granted one by one, with onboarding and privacy disclosure built in.

screenshots.title: Import existing exports and wipe local data cleanly
screenshots.caption: Bring in ChatGPT exports, review what is stored, and remove everything when needed.
